rcicrdiagnostics 0.2.0
  • Reference
    • rcicrdiagnostics: user's guide
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

check_duplicates()
Check for duplicate rows in response data
check_response_bias()
Check for response bias
check_response_coding()
Check that response values use the expected coding
check_response_inversion()
Detect response-code inversion
check_rt()
Response-time distributional checks
check_stimulus_alignment()
Check stimulus ids align with the stimulus pool
check_trial_counts()
Check trial counts per participant
check_version_compat()
Check rcicr version compatibility with a 2IFC rdata file
compute_infoval_summary()
Per-participant information-value (infoVal) summary
cross_validate_rt_infoval()
Cross-validate infoVal against RT quality
diagnose_infoval()
Guided diagnostic for low or negative infoVal
face_mask()
Oval face-region mask for a square image
infoval()
Per-producer informational value with trial-count-matched reference
is_rcdiag_result()
Test whether an object is an rcdiag_result
load_face_mask()
Load a face mask from a PNG or JPEG image
load_responses()
Load reverse correlation response data from a CSV file
rcdiag_report()
Construct an rcdiag_report object
rcdiag_result()
Construct an rcdiag_result object
read_noise_matrix()
Read a Brief-RC noise matrix text file
run_diagnostics()
Run the full battery of diagnostic checks
validate_noise_matrix()
Validate a Brief-RC noise matrix

Developed by Manuel Oliveira.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
